_comment: Override data for ores not available in DataForge. Keyed by DataForge filename (without extension). Names updated for 4.7.0.

quantainium_raw.name: Quantanium
quantainium_raw.description: Extremely volatile and valuable. Must be refined quickly before it destabilizes.

savrilium_ore.name: Savrilium
savrilium_ore.description: Legendary-tier mineral. Extremely high instability and resistance.

sileron_ore.name: Stileron
sileron_ore.description: Legendary-tier mineral with very high instability.

bexalite_raw.name: Bexalite
bexalite_raw.description: Rare and hard to crack, but very profitable.

taranite_raw.name: Taranite
taranite_raw.description: High-value mineral found on moons and asteroids.

laranite_raw.name: Laranite
laranite_raw.description: Reliable high-value metal. A staple for experienced miners.

agricium_ore.name: Agricium
agricium_ore.description: Valuable metal used in advanced electronics manufacturing.

borase_ore.name: Borase
borase_ore.description: Decent mid-tier mineral. Commonly found alongside higher-value ores.

ouratite_raw.name: Ouratite
ouratite_raw.description: Epic-tier mineral. High instability but valuable.

lindinium_ore.name: Lindinium
lindinium_ore.description: Epic-tier mineral with extreme instability and resistance.

torite_ore.name: Torite
torite_ore.description: Uncommon mineral. Moderate value for low effort.

titanium_ore.name: Titanium
titanium_ore.description: Strong industrial metal with steady demand.

diamond_raw.name: Diamond
diamond_raw.description: Precious gemstone found in rocky deposits.

gold_ore.name: Gold
gold_ore.description: Classic precious metal. Stable and moderately profitable.

copper_ore.name: Copper
copper_ore.description: Common industrial metal. Easy to mine, low profit margin.

beryl_raw.name: Beryl
beryl_raw.description: Common gemstone mineral with decent returns.

tungsten_ore.name: Tungsten
tungsten_ore.description: Dense industrial metal used in weapon manufacturing.

quartz_raw.name: Quartz
quartz_raw.description: Abundant crystalline mineral. Low value but easy to extract.

corundum_raw.name: Corundum
corundum_raw.description: Low-value gemstone. Common filler material in deposits.

iron_ore.name: Iron
iron_ore.description: Abundant base metal. Very common filler in most rock types.

tin_ore.name: Tin
tin_ore.description: Soft common metal. Low value, very easy to mine.

aluminium_ore.name: Aluminium
aluminium_ore.description: Abundant and cheap. Often found as filler in rock deposits.

ice_raw.name: Ice
ice_raw.description: Frozen water. Nearly worthless but extremely easy to extract.

silicon_raw.name: Silicon
silicon_raw.description: Common rock material. Essentially worthless filler.

minableelement_fps_hadanite.name: Hadanite
minableelement_fps_hadanite.description: Hand-mineable pink crystal found on cave floors. No ship laser needed.

minableelement_fps_carinite.name: Carinite
minableelement_fps_carinite.description: Hand-mineable deposit found on cave walls.
